explanation: This command includes the required flags (-spn, -clsid, -rbcd) and uses quotes around the SPN value to simulate a valid command line. It matches the Sigma rule's selection_cli_1 condition.
This command is a simplified version of the first, omitting quotes around the SPN value. It still satisfies the selection_cli_1 condition by including all required flags.
This command uses quotes around the SPN value and matches the selection_cli_1 condition by including all required flags. It is a direct representation of a typical KrbRelay command.
This command includes the 'shadowcred' keyword along with 'spn' and 'clsid' to match the selection_cli_2 condition. It simulates a command line that would trigger the Sigma rule.
This command includes 'spn', 'clsid', and 'session' to match the selection_cli_3 condition. It simulates a command line that would trigger the Sigma rule.
